title: Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR Overview
description: This dashboard provides centralized visibility into activity within Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR, including incident and audit logs, automation and API execution activity, monitor summaries, and detection rule insights.

definition.content:
[Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cortex/cortex-xsoar) is a security orchestration, automation, and unifying incident response (SOAR) platform that helps teams automate incident handling and integrate security tools to enhance SOC efficiency and reduce remediation time.

This dashboard provides centralized visibility into activity within Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR, including incident and audit logs, automation and API execution activity, monitor summaries, and detection rule insights.

For more information, see the [Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR Integration Documentation](https://docs.datadoghq.com/integrations/palo_alto_networks_cortex_xsoar/).

**Tips**
- Use the timeframe selector in the upper-right corner of the dashboard to change the default timeframe.
- Clone this dashboard to rearrange, modify, and add widgets and visualizations.

Provides visibility into incident and audit logs, highlighting user activity, log trends, event types, and client IP distribution. Use this group to monitor operational activity, identify anomalies, and investigate events with detailed log context.
This group provides an overview of automation and API activity along with SLA performance. It highlights automation and API execution activity, trends over time, and SLA status by type.

definition.title: Automation executions over time by type

definition.content: Datadog Cloud SIEM analyzes and correlates the Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR logs to detect threats to your environment in real time. If you don't see signals please make sure you've enabled [Datadog Cloud SIEM](/security/siem/home).
